# Workspace Copilot Instructions

This workspace uses Simple Block coding standards.

- For backend and block registration work, follow [Simple Block backend instructions](instructions/simple-block-backend.instructions.md).
- For frontend styling and JS behavior, follow [Simple Block frontend instructions](instructions/simple-block-frontend.instructions.md).
- For WordPress safety across all work, follow [WordPress core safety instructions](instructions/wordpress-core-safety.instructions.md).

When both could apply, prefer the more specific file-scoped instruction file based on the current edited file type.

Use the split backend/frontend files as the default setup. The combined file is available at [Simple Block combined instructions](instructions/simple-block-all.instructions.md) for teams that prefer one-file maintenance.
